situation: An employee creates a service work as part of their job duties, and the employer claims ownership of the work

options.action: Employee claims personal non-property rights to the work
options.consequence: Employer may dispute the claim, leading to further conflict

options.action: Employee waives all rights to the work
options.consequence: Employee may lose control over their work and potential future benefits

common_rookie_mistake: Failing to understand personal non-property rights and their implications
consequence_if_wrong: Loss of control over one's work and potential future benefits
rationale: Personal non-property rights are essential for authors to maintain control over their work and ensure their rights are respected
